      Buy Elden Ring Key at the best Prices

      • Info
      • About

      • News

      WHAT IS A Elden Ring KEY OR STEAM KEY?

      A Elden Ring Key (also known as a Elden Ring Steam Key, CD Key or Digital Code) is an official activation code that allows you to activate, download, and play Elden Ring PC on official platforms: Steam. Depending on the store, the code may be for Steam or the publisher's own platform.

      WHAT IS THE BEST Elden Ring PRICE FOR PC?

      The best price for Elden Ring PC is 28.12€ at YUPLAY, with 53.1% Off. We'll show you all the available promo codes and YUPLAY coupons to help you save money. Compare and find the best Elden Ring price from 35 trusted stores with 145 offers. Whether you're searching for Elden Ring cheap offers, best deals, or a specific Elden Ring key, use our exclusive discount codes to get the best price.

      Release date
      24 February 2022
      Official website
      en.bandainamcoent.eu
      Developer
      Fromsoftware
      Publisher
      Fromsoftware
      Activation
      Steam
      Platforms
      PC, PS4, PS5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X
      PEGI
      16
      Tags
      Action RPG Souls-like Third Person 3D Fantasy ... Atmospheric Family Friendly Open World PvP Character Customization Co-op Online Co-Op Multiplayer Singleplayer

      About Elden Ring

      Elden Ring is From Software’s newest IP, from the game developers that brought you Dark Souls series, Bloodborne, Demon Souls, etc. Journey to the Lands Between, a new fantasy world created by Hidetaka Miyazaki in close collaboration with George R. R. Martin world-renowned author behind the critically acclaimed Song of Ice and Fire series. You are a Tarnished a being half alive and dead exiled from the Lands Between a long time ago, now you return at the behest of Queen Marika the Eternal after the tragedy that is the shattering of the Erdtree, when brothers fought against brothers and the land is forever changed, the only way for peace to come back now is if you reform the Elden Ring, conquer the Land Between, and become Elden Lord.

      • Elden Ring is set on a vast open-world filled with fantastical landscapes, grassy plains, suffocating swamps, mountains, castles, and dungeons that connect with the main world seamlessly traverse the world on foot or on horseback alone or online with other players.
      • As you travel through the Land Between you will feel glimpses of the Elden Rings power unravel its mysteries, encounter adversaries that want the ring for their own gain, characters that might help or hinder your progress, and fearsome creatures that you have never seen before.
      • Create your own Character, with From Software’s signature action RPG mechanics in mind but now with more leeway for experimentation, use a variety of weapons, magical abilities, and skills found throughout the world. Use stealth to take out enemies one by one or come in guns blazing and call upon the spirits of your allies to come and aid you. It’s up to you how you want to approach exploration and combat.

      Elden Ring Reviews

      Elden Ring takes the shards of what came before and forges them into something that will go down in history as one of the all-time greats: a triumph in design and creativity, and an open-world game that distinguishes itself for what it doesn’t do as much as what it does.

      GameSpot

      From Software upped the ante, surpassing even their best efforts that we saw with Sekiro Shadows Die Twice in terms of world building. Elden Ring is an absolute must-play game for 2022, but set aside some time and some patience.

      Attack of the Fanboy

      Elden Ring is one of the best games in years, with a breathtaking vast world to explore, and one of the most satisfying combat systems in an RPG. This is the accumulation of FromSoftware’s work over the last thirteen years and an evolution on its inspiring formula.

      Hardcore Gamer

      Elden Ring Editions

      Don’t know which edition to choose? Here’s a guide to help you decide: Elden Ring: Which Edition to Choose?

      Elden Ring Deluxe Edition

      Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Edition

      Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Deluxe Edition

      ELDEN RING BUNDLE

      Begin a memorable journey across harsh realms with the Soulslike Bundle, a complete set of FromSoftware’s most famous and demanding action RPGs.

       
      • Dark Souls: Remastered
      • Dark Souls 2: Scholar of the First Sin
      • Dark Souls 3 Deluxe Edition containing:
      • Dark Souls 3 Base Game
      • Dark Souls 3 – Season Pass
      • Elden Ring
      • Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree
      • Elden Ring: Nightreign

      Minimum System Requirements:

      • OS: Windows 10
      • CPU: Intel Core i5-8400 , AMD Ryzen 3 3300X
      • RAM: 12 GB
      • HDD: 60 GB
      • GPU: Nvidia GEFORCE GTX 1060 3 GB, AMD RADEON RX 580 4 GB
      • DirectX: 12

      Recommended System Requirements:

      • OS: Windows 10 / 11
      • CPU: Intel Core i7-8700K, AMD Ryzen 5 3600X
      • RAM: 16 GB
      • HDD: 60 GB
      • GPU: Nvidia GEFORCE GTX 1070 8 GB, AMD RADEON RX VEGA 56 8 GB
      • DirectX: 12

      ELDEN RING SHADOW OF THE ERDTREE

      Get ready, Tarnished! Shadow of the Erdtree, Elden Ring’s epic expansion, unveils a mysterious story, fierce foes, and powerful gear to conquer!

      • Explore new areas and legacy dungeons in the Realm of Shadow, uncovering secrets and hidden dangers.
      • Face powerful enemies and terrifying monsters that test your skill in intense, thrilling battles.
      • Discover unique weapons, spells, and armor to enhance your character and master your combat style.
      • Unravel Miquella’s mystery and uncover secrets of a hidden war and Marika’s enigmatic past.

      Retailer leaks Elden Ring Tarnished Edition release date for Nintendo

      • 2d
        Elden Ring And The Duskbloods Still "Expected" To Release On Switch 2 In 2026
      • 2d
        We haven't heard anything for months about The Duskbloods and Elden Ring coming to Switch 2, but FromSoftware's owner insists they're still coming out this year
      • 3d
        Crimson Desert star acted in The Witcher 3, Cyberpunk 2077, and Elden Ring but says Pearl Abyss' "beautiful" open-world game is "unlike anything I've ever been involved in"
      • 3d
        "FromSoftware is making steady progress" amid push "to develop IP in games" and film, says owner Kadokawa as Elden Ring movie looms
      • 3d
        They can never compete with Elden Ring, but FromSoftware owner says Nightreign "performed strongly" and The Duskbloods is still coming in 2026
      • 10d
        Elden Ring modder bringing Morrowind to FromSoftware's RPG says it's "the most complex mod ever created," but he's "made tremendous progress"
      • 11d
        Morrowind in Elden Ring mod is now "mostly playable", despite the fact its creator's "entire existence has been consumed with interpreting gibberish code"
      • 12d
        A new Elden Ring world record was set just 2 weeks ago, and like everyone else I keep rewatching the same part of the 52-minute speedrun
      • 24d
        As filming of the Elden Ring movie continues, here's an on-set leak of some lettuce being hurled at one of the game's most infamous characters
      • 25d
        Even More Elden Ring Movie Set Leaks Emerge Online
      • 25d
        The Elden Ring movie's reported budget of $100 million makes it A24's most expensive film ever
      • 25d
        As Elden Ring fans wait for official news, leaked movie set images suggest the film will include significant pre-game backstory
      • 26d
        Elden Ring Movie Set Photos Leak
      • 26d
        Elden Ring movie set photos suggest the Loathsome Dung Eater and Raya Lucaria will appear in the A24 adaptation
      • 26d
        Elden Ring movie release date, cast, and story
      • 26d
        Elden Ring film budget reportedly "well over" $100m, and A24's "largest and most ambitious project" yet
      • 27d
        Elden Ring Movie Budget Update
      • 27d
        Dang, We Got An Elden Ring Movie Release Date Before The Switch 2 Port
      • 27d
        Elden Ring movie sets 2028 release date, full cast, and confirms it will be filmed for IMAX
      • 27d

      Elden Ring Price and Historical Lows

      Our PC game price tracker makes it easy to compare offers from official stores and CD Key sites from United Kingdom, United States of America, and Europe. Keep an eye on Elden Ring price trends on PC, and be alerted when the game drops to your desired best price in British pounds (GBP), US Dollars (USD) and Euros (EUR). Never miss out on the cheapest deal or a Elden Ring price drop again.

      Elden Ring PC Best Deals and Discounts

      Allkeyshop.com has been comparing prices from more than 100 stores specializing in digital distribution since 2012. Find the best Elden Ring deals and discount codes on the world’s leading price comparison site specializing in video games. Need a discount coupon, voucher, or gift card? Join our Reward Program! You can save even more by creating an alert on our price history. We send you notifications, so you never miss out on the best Elden Ring price.

      Download Elden Ring PC Immediately

      No matter which shop you select on Allkeyshop, as soon as you have purchased the game and it is released and the payment has been approved, you will receive your Elden Ring key instantly in one of the following ways:

      • Direct Download Link
      • Via email (check your spam folder)
      • Through your customer account

      You can then activate, download, and play Elden Ring on PC. You can watch our tutorials here and select the game platform. If a merchant puts your order on hold and performs additional security checks, do not panic! This is simply a security measure. If you do not want to give the seller this information, you can cancel your order and receive a refund.

      Why is Elden Ring Cheaper Than Official Stores?

      Official stores retail game keys directly from the publishers or developers of video games. At Allkeyshop, we compare all prices, including those from official platforms, to ensure you get the best deals. CD key stores buy through wholesalers located worldwide. It’s important to note that only publishers and official distributors can issue keys for their games. The Elden Ring key you receive will be authentic and original, issued directly by the game’s official distributors.

      Real-Time Elden Ring Price Tracking Powered by Allkeyshop’s Bots

      At Allkeyshop, we use advanced bots to scan prices across more than 100 trusted digital stores in real-time, covering over 200,000 video games across all platforms. This ensures that you always have access to the most accurate and up-to-date prices for Elden Ring. Our bots also account for any payment fees, so the prices displayed are the most precise and transparent available. This reliability makes Allkeyshop the best platform for tracking game prices, offering gamers the best deals and the most accurate prices.

      How to Get a Free Elden Ring Key for PC

      Want to get Elden Ring for free? Set up a price alert and select “when the game is free” to get notified instantly if it becomes available for free or as part of a promotion on stores like Epic Games, PlayStation Store, Steam, and Humble Bundle. Just check this page regularly.

      Additionally, join our Reward Program to win gift cards daily. Use these gift cards to buy Elden Ring at a reduced price or even for free, depending on your balance and a bit of luck!

      • –Join the Reward Program now!
      • –See our list of winners

      Cancel comment

      You must be logged in to post a comment.

      Mohamed 1 month ago
      5 / 5

      It’s undoubtedly one of the best open-world games I’ve ever played. The art style is incredible and the sense of freedom is total. Although it’s quite challenging, the satisfaction of beating a boss after several attempts is unrivalled. I highly recommend it, especially at the current price listed on the website!

      Log in to Reply
      markkashir456 1 year ago
      4.5 / 5

      Elden Ring is a true feast for soulslike fans. Tough but rewarding if you love a challenge

      Log in to Reply
      BraVinn 1 year ago
      5 / 5

      This game is so good that I can't stop playing it... :) <3

      Log in to Reply
      Asaf 1 year ago
      5 / 5

      its really fun game, but if you play too much a few new games, you'll get burnout and play on auto.

      Log in to Reply
      Riri from Allkeyshop 2 years ago
      5 / 5

      Sometimes a merchant may sell an account with the game you want to be connected to that account. Buying an account is often much cheaper than buying a game key or activation code. To download the game, follow these simple steps: - Login to the account with the details given to you by the seller. - Download the game to your PC. - Play the game! Remember to change the password for this new Steam account and the associated email. Family sharing is also an option, which allows you to play the game directly from your own account.

      Official and keysellers

      We have selected more than 59 official dealers and keysellers to create the largest price comparison database specialized in video games.

      Market best prices

      With 205299 games, we strive to find and maintain the best prices. Explore our accurate listings and use coupons to maximize your savings.

      Buyer Protection

      At Allkeyshop you are our priority. Therefore it is important that you always get the product you bought in the proper timeframe.

      AllKeyShop.com is a price comparison website that provides information and links to third-party online stores. We do not sell any products directly, nor are we involved in the sale or transaction process between users and the linked merchants. AllKeyShop.com is not affiliated with, associated with, authorized by, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with Fromsoftware, Fromsoftware, Elden Ring or any of their subsidiaries or affiliates. The official Elden Ring website can be found at: https://en.bandainamcoent.eu/elden-ring/elden-ring The names Elden Ring, Fromsoftware, Fromsoftware as well as related names, marks, emblems, and images, are registered trademarks of their respective owners. The prices on this site are for informational and comparative purposes only, consistent with fair use principles for identification or reference under applicable trademark laws in the EU (including those outlined in EU Regulation 2017/1001, Article 14), the UK, and the US.

      Important Considerations for Users:

      Accuracy of Information: While we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information, prices, availability, and other product details on linked external websites can change rapidly. We recommend verifying all information directly on the merchant's website before making any purchase. Third-Party Websites: We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or accuracy of information on any third-party websites linked from AllKeyShop.com. Your interactions and transactions with these external sites are solely at your own risk and subject to their terms and conditions. No Endorsement: The inclusion of a link to a third-party website does not imply endorsement or recommendation by AllKeyShop.com of that website or its products/services.
